$description: DTCG-compatible token import generated from packages/tokens/src/tokens/*.json.

authoritativeInput.notes: Figma is the known design input. Documentation platforms are output, not token creation input.

figmaDtcgInput.purpose: Input fixture only. No external documentation platform is part of token creation.

tiers.description: Raw reusable design values such as color ramps, radius, spacing, and typography.
Platform intent that remains independent of PrimeNG.
Design-system component intent exposed through wrapper APIs.
Provider-specific bridge consumed by internal PrimeNG components.

precedence: Component-intent tokens owned by the registry
PrimeNG provider mapping derived from semantic/component tokens
Temporary sample or bootstrap fallback values

normalizationRules.behavior: Wrappers may expose danger intent while translating to PrimeNG error terminology internally.
Retired bootstrap typography names map only when the active token source confirms aliases.
Missing provider ramp steps map to nearest approved primitive only with design approval.
Generate --p-* bridge variables from the same theme selector source as --ps-* variables.
Use component override CSS only for stable provider gaps not expressible through the preset.
